The '''''Stormhawk''''' was a [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] that served as part of [[Task Force Vengeance]]. It took part in the [[Evacuation of Gelgelar]] and stayed there to guard the station. Later the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] destroyed it in the [[attack on the Gelgelar system]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter]]'' {{1st}} {{C|Simulator appearance only}}
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]''
